overall.description: A cinematic game engine sequence showing a first-person walk through a medieval stone terrace and courtyard toward a gothic cathedral entrance. The scene features autumn foliage, ornate stone architecture, and an encounter with a robed figure before ascending to a massive carved wooden door.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone terrace with balustrade overlooking rocky ravine

events.description: camera looks down over the balustrade at the rocky ravine below

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the stone terrace, glancing down at the rocky drop below the balustrade

entered.detail: ornate carved stone railing with decorative pillars along the terrace edge
square stone pillar with carved details at the corner of the terrace
dense trees with red and orange autumn foliage surrounding the structure
ruined stone archway or bridge visible in the distance beyond the ravine
steep rocky cliff face visible below the terrace balustrade

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a stone terrace with ornate balustrades overlooking a rocky ravine. The camera walks forward along the terrace, briefly looking down at the drop below, with autumn forests and a distant stone arch visible in the background under overcast skies.

scene_state.functional_zone: cathedral courtyard with stone benches and burning braziers

events.description: turns right from the terrace into the open cathedral courtyard
robed figure approaches from the direction of the cathedral entrance

agents.ego_description: walking across the courtyard toward the cathedral entrance, approaching a figure in dark robes

notable_agents.action: figure in dark robes walking toward the camera with arms crossed, passing by on the right side

entered.detail: ornate stone bench with decorative carvings positioned along the courtyard edge
tall stone brazier with burning flames providing warm light
massive stone cathedral facade with tall arched windows and detailed masonry
large wooden door with intricate geometric carvings and metal studs
circular emblem with geometric patterns set into the courtyard pavement

segments.scene_description: The camera turns into a wide courtyard dominated by a gothic cathedral facade. As the camera advances toward the ornate wooden main door, it passes a carved stone bench and lit brazier. A robed NPC approaches from the center and passes by on the right, continuing toward the terrace.

agents.ego_description: continuing across the courtyard toward the cathedral entrance, passing over the circular stone seal

entered.detail: lit wall-mounted lanterns on stone pillars flanking the approach to the steps

segments.scene_description: The camera continues across the empty courtyard toward the cathedral, passing the circular stone seal on the ground. The building facade grows larger as wall lanterns become visible, and the autumn trees recede to the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: cathedral entrance with stone staircase and carved wooden doors

events.description: begins ascending the curved stone steps leading to the main entrance

agents.ego_description: walking up the curved stone steps toward the massive wooden cathedral doors, approaching the entrance

entered.detail: curved stone staircase with wide steps leading up to the cathedral entrance
lit sconces mounted on the stone walls beside the door casting warm light
green ivy vines growing on the stone wall beside the wooden door

segments.scene_description: The camera begins ascending the curved stone steps toward the cathedral entrance. The massive carved wooden door fills the frame as wall sconces provide warm illumination, and ivy vines are visible growing on the stone walls flanking the entrance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from an open, windswept stone terrace toward the imposing entrance of a gothic cathedral. It begins by walking along ornate balustrades overlooking a rocky ravine and autumn forests under overcast skies, before turning away from the drop to enter a wide courtyard. As the camera advances toward the cathedral facade, it passes a lit brazier and a carved stone bench while a robed figure crosses the path from the center toward the terrace. The scene then expands across the open courtyard, passing a circular stone seal on the ground as the massive building looms larger and the surrounding autumn trees recede. Finally, the camera ascends curved stone steps, moving past ivy-covered walls and warm wall sconces until the massive carved wooden door fills the frame.
